description: Any user-facing artifact labeled or presented as an OS bundle must be the full bootable incorporated MetaBlooms OS authority ZIP, not a support bundle, proof bundle, overlay, receipt bundle, or tiny work slice.
required_properties: full extraction or full streamed CRC proof passes
runtime starter smoke passes from fresh extraction
boot executor smoke passes from fresh extraction
contains tracker or tracker preview/control surface state when present
contains all integrated governance/invariant/tool-install changes from the stage
support/proof bundles are explicitly labeled support/proof bundles and never called OS bundles
rationale: Prior workflow failures occurred when small governance/proof artifacts were delivered in a way that functioned as or resembled an OS bundle. This invariant closes the label/delivery gap that the older portable-baseline guard did not fully cover.
